reviews.review_description:
It's not the best, BUT out of the dozens that I've played on Meta Quest, it's up there. 

Omega Pilot (hover crafts)
DRFT
Echo Drift (retro style hover cars) *has the same NOS SFX*
Grid
Speed One

Speed one has decent car graphics (interior as well), the ability to steer with the thumbstick it virtual wheel and actually has good handling and response, you can drive in 1st person or 3rd, The car selection is, "eh" and the tracks are decent.. it's worth the $5

It has a multi player mode, but I haven't tried it yet.

The game is good The stern is good The break is good The interior is good the cars look good The track's looking at just need more tracks trust with tunnels dramatic weather like rain thunderstorm fall evening a snow level stages bigger tracks bigger level different types of tracks more cars Woodforest tracks totals More race missions in the city people walk around the city you want to be at work mountain levels going uphill downhill do mountains forces while having a wall block you in mother open world kind of thing night time driving with the headlights tomorrow different music different cars

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you so much for such an incredibly detailed and passionate review. It is exactly this kind of feedback that helps me make Speed One the best racing experience it can be!

I love your ideas—especially the ones about dramatic weather like thunderstorms, more 'alive' environments with people and animals, and adding mountain tunnels. I’m already looking into expanding the map variety and adding more vehicles to the garage. Your suggestions for drifting with a handbrake and more reactive AI are also very exciting and are definitely being noted for future updates.

As a developer, I want the world to feel as alive as possible, and your vision for forests, night driving, and more 'city life' aligns perfectly with where I want to take the game. Stay tuned for upcoming patches and content drops!

Thank you for playing and for being part of the journey. Keep your eyes on the track—there’s a lot more coming! 🏎️⚡

reviews.review_description:
This is like the little racing game that could. I think it’s worth supporting the developers heart is in the right place and when I play it, it does have the fun factor you look for in a racing game. I like the inclusion of nitrous. The simplicity of the game is accessible. 

That being said, I wouldn’t mind some more car selections and more levels.
Visible damage from crashes might be good and a way to reenter easier if there isn’t one already

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the support! I'm thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the fun factor and the nitrous mechanics in Speed One. As the developer, it means a lot to know the heart put into the game is visible. I've noted your suggestions regarding more cars, levels, and visual damage—they are definitely in the plans! I'll also look into making the car reset/re-entry more intuitive. Thanks for being part of this journey!

reviews.review_description:
Speed ​​One stands out for its excellent free-roaming mode with quests, as well as its efficient and fun arcade gameplay.
In single-player mode, you feel the speed from the very beginning, both in classic circuit racing mode and in quest mode.
Multiplayer adds a competitive dimension, perfect for challenging your friends. The game allows you to play seated, which enhances comfort.
Two views are available: one in arcade mode with a third-person view and control with the controller sticks, and the other, more immersive in VR, with a first-person view and VR control with your hands on the wheel. This mode offers effective and useful rearview mirrors in race mode.
Technically, the fluidity remains good on Quest 3, minimizing nausea and avoiding distractions. Visually, Speed ​​One opts for a clear and readable aesthetic rather than hyperrealism.
A wise choice that prioritizes responsiveness. The lack of ultra-advanced physics is compensated for by immediate fun.
Speed ​​One is one of the few VR racing titles on Quest to deliver punch without compromising on comfort and innovating in its game modes.
As you progress, you unlock new vehicles.
The development team is active and attentive to the community.
CONCLUSION:
Speed ​​One surprises with its fluidity, even on a Quest 2. You can tell the studio focused on instant fun, and it works. It's not a hyper-realistic sim, but honestly, it's a quick blast, without getting overwhelmed.
And in VR, it's nice to have a game that gives the sensation of speed without making you sick. In short, a little arcade gem worth following.

developer_response.body:
✨ Thank you so much for your detailed and positive review! We’re thrilled to hear that you felt the fun and immersion we’ve worked hard to bring to Speed One. 🚗💨

Our goal has always been to create an experience that’s accessible, fun, and comfortable in VR, without losing the real sense of speed. It’s amazing to see that this is reaching players like you!

🔓 New cars, modes, and improvements are on the way — and every bit of feedback from the community helps us grow even more.

If you enjoy racing games in VR, Speed One is made to deliver quick, immersive adrenaline without motion sickness. Come race with us! 🏁🔥

reviews.review_description:
I purposely try all the car games on Vr because I simply love car games, I'm not too judgemental especially when  a game is still in early Access 

So Im not telling you what to do, but wanted you to know that you may have a jewel car game here..its awesome in its early stages.

Many vr games try different approaches and I think your formula is closest to being most fun.. The A.i drivers are Great, I can see the drivers in the car as well 👍 I see the streaks in the road and grass and back lights works lol. 

Alot of times it's the small things that gives you a cult following😎.
 Not fulfilling every little car enthusiasts desires because as you said in a response your just 1 person. You're definitely Appreciated here, because the car feels good and is in line with the nitro boost..love this😆..think this what made me buy it. #Street life. 

Just a Vr game and don't need to add 1000 things like other people suggested.

Slowly implementing little things like working headlights, being able to maybe touch the radio or stick shift would help with immersion, being able to adjust the review mirror and last but not least any graphical enhancements will set this game apart. I deleted many games.. But this will stay in my Library..thank you for such a better quality game.

People wouldn't suggest things if this didn't have the crazy Potential. Wish you luck in your Endeavors ✨


UPDATE JUN 18, 2025

🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥THIS OPEN WORLD UPDATE IS FIRE.. REALLY TURNED THIS GAME INTO A NEW GAME WAY BETTER NOW AND IT WORKING Marvelously for me..  i don't have any Gripes really because you said youll still be updating the game...... 
 i desperately NEED to tell you yo open up a Discord like all good games do! it makes yhe developer look like they care about their game and you can interact with us more. its hard to tell you hiw great your game is or give you ideas because you don't have a DISCORD like everyone else.... Only reason im writing it here in hopes you see it💯💯💯

hope in yhe future you guys aRe able to add a working radio with music, working healights, better graphics, more vibrations , money staus on screen, because this almost reminds me of gta but in the car 🔥🔥

open a discord🔥🔥💯 craxy cool game 🎮

Update jun 19

Not sure if its  Only me but i dont think the discord is working. i keep getting link doesn't exist or Expired. check it.. but good work jumping on it.  it can be me tho but let me know.

developer_response.body:
Hey! Man, I have to say, your review absolutely made my day. For real. It's not just the praise, but the way you described your experience. That's exactly the feeling I'm hoping to create, and reading that from someone who genuinely loves car games like you do is just fantastic.
Seeing that you noticed the details, the evolution with the update, and most importantly, that you felt the game's "crazy potential"... that's priceless. It's the kind of feedback that reminds me exactly why I started this project as a solo dev.
And don't you worry, your message was received loud and clear! You're completely right about the importance of a community. So, I wanted to let you know personally: I'm now working on setting up our Discord server, and it's coming very soon! Your passion in asking for it definitely lit a fire under me to get it done.
I'm incredibly grateful for every suggestion and for believing in the game enough to keep it in your library. It truly means the world to me.
I'll see you on Discord soon. Thanks again for everything! ✨🎮

[UPDATE jun 20] new invite Discord: https://discord.gg/fnMFBVE5rM 
or server id: 1384968571498795049

reviews.review_description: In multiplayer when you finish the race the game crashes and says you finished 7 th. You cannot go back to the lobby or do anything except exit the game completely

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! I'm a solo indie dev and the game is still in development — this bug will be fixed in the next update. I’m working hard to make Speed One the best VR racing experience out there. Big improvements are coming — stay tuned! 🚀🏁

reviews.review_description: Can't wait to see the next update! Everyone wants to know when's that free world coming out, if you had to guess a timeframe?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review and for playing Speed One! I'm really glad you're enjoying it!

I wanted to let you know that the open-world map is almost ready! We're in the testing phase now, fixing a few bugs and polishing everything. This big update will bring a lot of exciting new content — including missions you can complete around the city!

You'll find racing missions through the streets, destruction challenges where you’ll need to take down enemy cars without getting destroyed, collectible items hidden around the map, and much more. There's still a lot of cool stuff coming soon!

Thanks again for your support — can’t wait for you to try the new update!

reviews.review_description: Beats alot of racing games out there. Cant wait for the updates

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing Speed One!! I'm working on a big update that will be released soon! In addition to races, you'll have an open-world city where you can complete missions and earn rewards! In the future, you'll be able to tweak your car setup, customize it, enjoy an improved multiplayer experience, and much more!!! Thanks a lot for the 5 stars!

reviews.review_description: This is a good game so far !  cant wait to see the updates.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! Thank you so much for your positive feedback on Speed One Real Racing! It's great to know you're having fun.
We're working on updates and can't wait to share what's new with you too!
Thanks for your support!

reviews.review_description:
I have this racing game on my Quest 3 and it's been fine up till now. However, when I launch the game I seem to be stuck within the garage wall. How can I correct things. I keep quitting and relaunching to no avail.

Update on my review. You must have updated the software as the issue seems to be corrected. Many thanks.

Game going well since the update

developer_response.body:
Hey! I'm really glad to hear the game is running well for you after the update! 😊

If you ever find yourself stuck in the garage wall again, try holding the reset position button on your controller for a few seconds—it should realign your position. If that doesn't work, you can also use the Quest’s built-in "Reset View" option under Settings > Position Tracking > Seated Mode to adjust your tracking.

Thanks again for your support and for sticking with Speed One! 🚗💨 See you on the track! 🔥

reviews.review_description: It's good but where are the settings??I just purchased the full game but I'm unable to change anything in the game ie position, audio, controls etc. I will have to get a refund if there is no fix. This game needs work

developer_response.body:
Hello, and thank you for taking the time to leave your feedback! 😊 As an indie developer pouring my heart and soul into this project, it means a lot to hear from players like you who care enough to share their thoughts.

I completely understand how frustrating it must be not to have the customization options you expect, and I deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused. The game is still in development, and features like settings for audio, controls, and positions are absolutely on our roadmap.

We’re a small team (just me, actually!) working tirelessly to improve and implement the features our community needs, and feedback like yours helps us prioritize what matters most. I truly hope you'll give us the chance to make the game everything you hoped it would be.

Your support means the world, and I'm sincerely sorry if this early version didn’t meet your expectations. Please stay tuned for updates—we're working on it!

Thanks again for your patience and understanding. I hope to make it up to you soon!

reviews.review_description:
"Speed One" offers an exhilarating VR experience that sets itself apart from many others in its genre. The game's dynamic gameplay, immersive visuals, and well-crafted mechanics make it an absolute joy to play. Whether you're racing through intricate tracks or navigating challenging obstacles, "Speed One" keeps the adrenaline pumping and the fun alive.

One of the standout features is how seamlessly the controls integrate with VR technology, enhancing the sense of immersion and giving players a feeling of true speed and freedom. The graphics are stunning, capturing the vibrant environments and creating a visceral experience that feels like you're truly in the game.

However, my experience with the game's social features has been somewhat mixed. While "Speed One" promises the ability to connect and interact with friends, I found this aspect a bit challenging. It's possible that I'm missing a step or approaching it incorrectly, but the process of syncing with friends felt less intuitive compared to the rest of the game. If this is an area for improvement, a more straightforward or clearly explained system for social interactions would truly elevate the game to perfection.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review! I'm really happy to hear that you enjoyed the gameplay, visuals, and overall VR experience of Speed One — it means a lot!

And I truly appreciate your feedback regarding the social features. You're absolutely right — connecting with friends should be as smooth and intuitive as the rest of the game. I'm already working on a major update that includes big improvements to the multiplayer system, making it easier to find and play with friends. This update will also bring a new open-world city, missions with rewards, and car customization features!

Thanks again for your thoughtful words and for taking the time to share your experience — feedback like yours helps shape the future of the game!

reviews.review_description: I played one track one car as far as pickup and go native vr. I couldn’t ask for more. As simple as it is meaning I’m sure the physics don’t match up like a lifelike car but I have no doubt that it will eventually. This game has no flaws that I can see that would stop me from coming back. I’d play this over Aseto Corsa. Because I know it would work every time I fired it up. Bravo!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your enthusiastic review! It's incredibly rewarding to hear that you had such a positive experience with the game. We're continuously working to enhance the physics and overall experience, so your feedback is invaluable. We're thrilled to have you on board and can't wait to bring even more excitement to your gaming sessions in the future. Bravo indeed!

reviews.review_description: Nice 1000 stars!
Love the feel of the game, you can feel the speed. The bot drivers don't know a clean race if it rammed into them. Can't wait for the game to expand and include nitro and tournaments.

developer_response.body: I will implement nitro soon! It was a great suggestion! Thanks a lot for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Overall, the driving physics are good. You feel like you’re really in a car and the car handles well. The biggest drawback is the AI they pretty much make the game almost unenjoyable. They blatantly wreck you a lot. They don’t hold good lines during corners. They just slam the wall. And somehow, even if they hit the wall or they wreck, they somehow catch you going super fast and pass you when you had a 10 to 20 car gap between them. The game doesn’t reward you for holding a good line. The AI’s really need to be fixed please!!!! 
P.s 
Could you please add an oval track similar to like a NASCAR track like a Daytona or a Talladega? ￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback! We're glad you're enjoying the driving physics and feeling immersed in the experience. 🙌 We hear you loud and clear about the AI behavior and are already working on adjustments to make the races more balanced and enjoyable.  

As for the oval track suggestion, that's an awesome idea! 🚗💨 We're excited to share that we're planning to add a track inspired by NASCAR circuits in an upcoming update. Stay tuned—great things are on the way! 🎉

reviews.review_description: bought this game 12 months ago, played it once and just uninstalled it. installed again lastnight and wow wow WOOOW. good graphics, awesome control and ilove the factthat the AI's areaggressive.......at least no shooting. this game will test your driving patience and teach u to stay calm and coolwith othercrazy drivers in real life....So much potential if the devs keep updating. Seriously worth purchasing❤️

developer_response.body:
Hey! Thank you so much for giving our game another shot and for the awesome review! 🙌 We're really happy to hear that you’re enjoying the graphics, controls, and the aggressive AI (without the shooting, of course 😆).

We’ve got a lot of exciting updates planned, and you’re definitely going to be surprised with what’s coming next! Stay tuned because we’re just getting started. 🚀

Thanks again for your support! ❤️🏁

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE II: It's amazing to come back and see the further development of the game. Now even Multiplayer has been implemented and Leaderboards for each track. But the opponent cars are a bit too aggressive now 😅

UPDATE I: I came back to the game and was surprised with new tracks and cars, also the issue with selecting cars I had mentioned was sovlved in the meantime, many thanks 😎

~~~

I just tested the game on my Quest 3 yesterday and played it through.

First of all, I'd like to thank the developer, since I love racing games, in particular in VR 3D. But there are not many of this kind, apart from Fun Kart games.

I was really impressed, there has been put a lot of effort, dedication and love into it. Not only the landscapes of the tracks, sitting in and driving the cars feels pretty realistic. One can even grab the steering wheel. Control physics is smooth. The animation after the games is very nice.

The last track, No. 4, i.e. the night track, left me completely stunned, wow! The effects of the lights are perfect 😎

I just had problems reselecting the second car after reverting to the first one. But the game is still in development, I understand. The problem with the curves I only had at the beginning, it simply requires skills to handle them - like in real life and in the big racing games. 

Please keep it up, I am convinced many of us need your game. Good luck!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! I'm very happy to know that you're enjoying it! I'm still going to implement Nitro, more cars, tracks, challenges and multiplayer tournaments!

reviews.review_description: I feel that the game is good but lacking in some areas of content. 6 cars? unless I just dont know how to get more cars this is area of the game needs improvement. I want to see brands like koenigsegg, bugatti, lamborghini, nissan, ferrari, pagani, mclaren, mazda, ford, the list goes on. And some car customization and upgrades. being able to change stuff like rims, spoilers, and suspension. for performance, maybe you can upgrade your engine increasing speed, turbochargers increasing acceleration, tires increasing handling, and NOS upgrades increasing, well, NOS. the tracks are really fun, i mean it. NOS and the opponent AI is really good and well made. can you race online? when i press multiplayer it puts me in some sort of rocket league lobby and makes me wait forever. Overall still a fun game that i enjoy even though it is still a work in progress. You did a great job.

developer_response.body:
Hello! First of all, thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review. 😊 As an indie developer working hard to make this game the best it can be, hearing your thoughts really motivates me to keep improving.

You’re absolutely right—adding more cars and customization options would take the game to the next level. I love your ideas about including iconic brands like Koenigsegg, Bugatti, and Ferrari, as well as customization options like rims, spoilers, and performance upgrades. Rest assured, these features are high on my list of priorities, and your suggestions align perfectly with the vision I have for the game’s future.

Regarding multiplayer, I understand your frustration. The current system is still in its early stages, and we’re working on improving matchmaking to ensure smoother and faster connections. I deeply appreciate your patience as I refine this experience.

It’s incredibly rewarding to hear that you’re enjoying the tracks and AI. Knowing that some elements already stand out in a positive way is a big win for me as a solo developer. Thank you for recognizing the effort that went into creating them.

Your support and encouragement mean the world. Please stay tuned for updates—we’re working hard to expand the content and bring you the game you envision. Thanks again for your trust and for playing. I’m excited to show you what’s coming next!

reviews.review_description:
14.12.2024

The boost option is really well-designed, but an adjustment would be necessary: it would be better if the boost didn’t recharge so quickly. As for the gameplay, it is perfect, and I must emphasize that it’s one of the best I’ve experienced in this genre. I would have loved for the game to feature a Formula 1 car while maintaining this exceptional gameplay. The Meta Quest store is sorely lacking in F1-focused games, which could be a great opportunity.

Regarding the interface, I suggest adjusting the circuit map located next to the timer by making it slightly smaller so that it’s more visible. Additionally, it would be a good idea to improve the rearview mirror display, which currently shows cars in a very pixelated way. Beyond that, I want to encourage the developer to continue with this ambitious project: adding more tracks, especially in varied environments like snow, sand, or rocky terrains with obstacles, would be a fantastic addition.

In summary, I love the gameplay—please don’t change anything about it. The new beta mode is also an excellent idea. The adventure is just beginning, and I wish the developer great success moving forward!

——————————————————————————————————-


**Excellent Gameplay, but Some Areas Need Improvement**  

I’m revisiting this game after 6 months, and I have to say the gameplay is simply outstanding. It’s undoubtedly one of the best in its category, if not the best. The sense of speed is definitely there, and it’s a true pleasure to hold the wheel and drive. You can tell that a tremendous amount of work went into this aspect by the developers.  

However, there are a few aspects that could be improved:  

1. **AI of Opponent Cars:**  
   The AI-controlled cars can sometimes ruin the gaming experience. They are often overly aggressive, giving the impression of a chase rather than a proper race. They also tend to either overtake the player or crash into them unrealistically, even when you’re at top speed and driving perfectly.  
   👉 **Suggestion:** Make the AI more realistic by programming it to avoid collisions as much as possible while still making occasional mistakes for authenticity.  

2. **Graphics Need Improvement:**  
   The game could benefit from a bit of visual enhancement. For instance, the image quality in the rearview mirror is very low, which detracts from the immersion. Being able to see the cars behind you clearly would be a big improvement. Overall, making the game’s animations crisper and more polished would enhance the experience.  

3. **Pricing to Reconsider:**  
   To attract more players, I think it would be a good idea to make the game temporarily free or reduce its price to $4. Another option could be to offer a 50% discount code.  

Despite these points, I loved playing this game again. The gameplay is exceptional, and the driving sensation is incredibly immersive. Kudos to the developers for their excellent work—you deserve 5 stars! With a few adjustments, this game could achieve perfection. 👏
